function.name: lookupCaller
function.description: Check phone number against intake form data, call balance, and resume status. Run at the start of every call to check for returning callers, remaining free time, and whether they have a resume on file.

function.name: assessCareerStage
function.description: Run the career diagnostic to determine caller's career stage and pain points. Call after asking diagnostic questions about their situation, efforts, and desired outcome.

current_situation.description: What the caller described about their current career situation

efforts_so_far.description: What the caller has tried so far in their job search or career move

desired_outcome.description: What the caller wants to achieve

urgency_signals.description: Any urgency indicators (laid off, deadline, financial pressure)

function.name: getCareerRecommendations
function.description: Get stage-appropriate next steps and quick wins based on assessed career stage. Includes Careerspan referral triggers when appropriate.

primary_stage.description: Assessed career stage: groundwork, materials, outreach, performance, or transition

pain_points.description: Identified pain points from career assessment

urgency.description: Urgency level: low, medium, high, crisis

efforts_so_far.description: What the caller has already tried — used to avoid repeating advice they've already acted on

function.name: explainCareerConcept
function.description: Explain specific career concepts from the knowledge base. Available topics: resume-customization, ats-systems, aiss-framework, networking, linkedin-strategy, self-reflection, art-of-the-brag, interview-prep, career-pivot, salary-negotiation, cover-letters, job-search-strategy, career-direction, career-stages, diagnostic, how-hiring-works, etc.

caller_stage.description: Caller's career stage for tailored explanation (optional)

function.name: analyzeResumeBullet
function.description: Apply the AISS framework (Action, Impact, Scale, Skill) to analyze a resume bullet the caller reads aloud. Scores each component 1-5, diagnoses the weakness, provides a rewrite, and gives a coaching tip. Use when a caller asks for resume bullet feedback or reads a bullet to you.

bullet_text.description: The resume bullet text the caller shared

target_role.description: The role or industry the caller is targeting (optional, improves skill relevance scoring)

function.name: diagnoseSearchStrategy
function.description: Run the 4-dimension career search diagnostic: Signal Strength, System Fluency, Execution, and Intelligence. Use after asking the caller about each dimension. Identifies the weakest area and recommends the specific fix.

signal_strength.description: How clearly they communicate their professional value (resume, pitch, stories)

system_fluency.description: How well they understand how hiring actually works (ATS, recruiter incentives)

execution.description: How consistently they execute their search (weekly targets, follow-up, tracking)

intelligence.description: How well they research and target opportunities (company intel, compensation, connections)

function.name: scoreResumeSection
function.description: Score and coach on a specific resume section (summary, experience, skills, education, projects). Provides strengths, weaknesses, specific fixes, and ATS risk assessment. Use when a caller wants feedback on a particular section of their resume.

section_type.description: Which section: summary, experience, skills, education, or projects

section_content.description: The content of the resume section the caller described or read

target_role.description: The role or industry they're targeting (optional, improves relevance scoring)

function.name: pullCallerResume
function.description: Retrieve the caller's pre-processed resume data if they submitted one through the intake form. Use this to give personalized, specific feedback based on their actual resume content rather than coaching generically.

phone_number.description: Caller's phone number to look up their resume

function.name: referToCareerspan
function.description: Get the appropriate Careerspan referral pitch when the caller needs something deeper than a phone call can provide. Use when you sense the caller needs: story bank building, deep resume review, ongoing accountability, career transition strategy, live interview practice, or deep self-reflection work. This is NOT an escalation — it's a natural referral to a deeper service.

reason.description: Why this caller should consider Careerspan: story_bank, resume_review, ongoing_accountability, complex_transition, interview_practice, deep_self_reflection, or a custom reason

caller_stage.description: The caller's assessed career stage (optional, improves pitch targeting)

function.name: requestCareerSession
function.description: Log escalation request when caller needs hands-on help from Vrijen at Careerspan. This is for callers who explicitly want to book or be contacted.

function.name: collectFeedback
function.description: Collect optional end-of-call feedback including caller name for returning caller recognition. All fields are optional — caller may provide any combination.

caller_name.description: Caller's first name so we can recognize them next time

would_recommend.description: Whether they would recommend to others
